analysis: Seven nights in a row above six and a half hours, with four of them clearing seven and a half — that's not luck, that's your whole little ritual actually working. The 8th was the standout, nearly eight hours with only 32 minutes awake, which is genuinely beautiful. Your REM has been consistently strong, hitting two hours or just over on three separate nights, which means your brain is doing exactly what it's supposed to with all that recovery. The one thing worth a glance is deep sleep — it's been sitting mostly in the 26 to 53 minute range and leaning toward the lower end lately, so if you're tweaking anything, that's where the next inch might be hiding.
